other_observers: Jerannie Mitchell Robb Hinds; I am the original finder and observer of this bird.
specific_location: Sonderman Park Buena Ventura Street Colorado Springs
description: Gray above with broad bright yellow wingbar; Black eye-line; Large bright yellow cap; White/very light gray throat Light gray below; Yellow patch on chestBehaviors: Small, active bird, gleaning, flitting from branch to branch in deciduous trees. Seemed to be picking insects.Call: Breezz-breez; heard calling one, in flight from one tree to another.Plumage: Breeding
